LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CRANE CO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BASED ON THE MERRICK DECLARATION, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. PLAINTIFF RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON EXPOSURE BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION EXPLAINING THE BASIS FOR WORK ON ORIGINAL EQUIPMENT. THE COURT GRANTS SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE ISSUE OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND DECLINES TO DO SO WITH RESPECT TO COMPONENT AND AFFIXED PARTS BECAUSE SUCH A RULING WOULD NOT RESOLVE A CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS 9 AND 10 ARE SUSTAINED AND THE OTHERS ARE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Megan Cesare-Eastman of K & L Gates (882.8000) for defendant and moving party
James Nevin of Brayton Purcell (898.1555) for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CRANE CO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant shifted the burden of producing evidence based on the Merrick Declaration, special interrogatories and plaintiff's deposition testimony. Plaintiff raised a triable issue of fact on exposure based on plaintiff's declaration explaining the basis for work on original equipment. The Court grants SUMMARY ADJUDICATION on the issue of punitive damages and declines to do so with respect to component and affixed parts because such a ruling would not resolve a cause of action. Defendant's evidentiary objections 9 and 10 are sustained and the others are overruled. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is denied. The motion is based on exposure to defendant's products. Defendant's separate statement does not raise the issue of replacement parts. It does not appear that defendant has shifted the burden of producing evidence given plaintiff's identification of Anton on the U.S.S. Parsons. Plaintiff also presents evidence through the declarations of Anton and Ay that raise a triable issue of fact. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J.
